examples: They want to work in an organization whose values are congruent with their own.
If you want to succeed, you must be congruent.
Congruent with statements of other Andromedan contactees.
It is often assumed that periods of sharp commodity price increase are congruent with periods of overall price inflation.
Anecdotally, in these cases most entrepreneurs choose their values and believe in their ability to cultivate other more congruent business opportunities.
